opportunities.title: [OSS] lingdojo/kana-dojo: [Good First Issue] 🀄 Add new Grammar Point 14 - Beginner-Friendly Open-source Contribution
opportunities.description:
## 🟢 Good First Issue: Add Grammar Point #14 — Beginner-Friendly Open Source Contribution

![Time: <1 minute](https://img.shields.io/badge/Time-<1_minute-brightgreen) ![Difficulty: Beginner](https://img.shields.io/badge/Difficulty-Beginner-blue) ![No Code Required](https://img.shields.io/badge/No_Code-Required-orange)

> 🟢 **No prerequisites needed!** You don't need to clone the repo, install anything, or write code.
> This entire contribution can be done from your browser in under 60 seconds.

**Labels:** good first issue, help wanted, hacktoberfest  
**Language:** JSON (no coding required)

opportunities.title: [OSS] proompteng/bilig: docs(examples): add Oak WorkPaper route smoke
opportunities.description:
Add a small Oak route example for serving a WorkPaper calculation from `@bilig/headless` in a Deno TypeScript service.

Task:
- Add an Oak-focused note or runnable snippet to `examples/serverless-workpaper-api/README.md` or the nearest existing route-adapter doc.
- Keep it TypeScript-first: use a `.ts` example name and import the shared WorkPaper request handler instead of duplicating workbook setup.
- Show one route that reads the summary and one route that applies an input edit, matching the existing response shape used by the serverless smoke examples.
- Add an npm script only if you add a

opportunities.title: [OSS] Iankitsinghak/HerFlow: Add Like Feature to Community Forum Posts
opportunities.description: The Community Forum section currently allows users to create posts and comment on them, but there is no way for users to react to posts. Adding a Like feature will improve engagement and allow users to show support or appreciation for community posts. ## Requirements - Add a Like button/icon to each forum post card - Display total number of likes for every post - Users should be able to: - Like a post - Unlike a post - Update the UI dynamically without page

opportunities.title: [OSS] kubestellar/console: [BUG] Host-to-Container Storage Metric Leak
opportunities.description:
## User Request

**Type:** bug
**Target:** Console Application
**Submitted by:** @rabbitc0der
**Console Request ID:** 0949f27f-9e3a-4e97-a55a-0e54629c5ea1

## Description

What happened:
The Storage card reports an inflated value of 1007 GB for a containerized local cluster. This value appears to be pulling the total disk capacity of the Windows host machine (C: drive) rather than the storage limits defined within the Docker Desktop environment or the Kubernetes PV/PVC subsystem.

What I expected:
Storage metrics should be scoped to the Kubernetes environment. It should report either the sum o

opportunities.title: [OSS] kubestellar/console: [BUG] Node Capacity Progress Bar Calculation Error
opportunities.description:
## User Request

**Type:** bug
**Target:** Console Application
**Submitted by:** @rabbitc0der
**Console Request ID:** cbe970bd-cc12-4ec0-9b59-d8cee9a17446

## Description

What happened:
Upon successfully connecting a single-node kind cluster, the Nodes card in the Stats Overview displays "1 total nodes" but shows a 0% filled progress bar. Despite the node being healthy and active, the visual indicator fails to represent 100% resource availability.

What I expected:
The progress bar component should dynamically calculate the percentage of healthy nodes relative to the total node count ($Percen

opportunities.title: [OSS] ysfsrtl123/bionluk-radar-extension: Improve Bionluk parser reliability
opportunities.description:
## Amaç

Bionluk Radar şu anda Bionluk'un girişli freelancer panelindeki alıcı isteklerini `POST /api/request/list_all/` endpointi üzerinden kontrol ediyor.

Bu parser yapısının daha sağlam, sürdürülebilir ve Bionluk API/response değişikliklerine karşı daha dayanıklı hale getirilmesi gerekiyor.

Amaç, alıcı isteklerini doğru şekilde ayrıştırmak, eksik/hatalı veri durumlarını daha iyi yönetmek ve ileride Bionluk tarafında küçük değişiklikler olduğunda eklentinin tamamen bozulmasını engellemektir.

## Mevcut Durum

- Eklenti Bionluk oturumu üzerinden alıcı isteklerini kontrol ediyor.
- `src/bion
